response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/backend engineer with strong web, distributed systems, and testing craftsmanship, but the role explicitly demands a C++ developer with 8-12 years of focused C++/STL, multi-threading, message broker, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443/SDL) experience. The only C++ exposure listed is a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols, or secure-by-design IEC 62443 work. Skill stack centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which does not align with the core competencies required.
strengths: Solid 10+ year engineering career with distributed/high-throughput systems
Strong testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship background
Some networking/async experience via DLang microservices at Sociomantic
concerns: Minimal and dated C++/STL hands-on experience
No demonstrated IEC 62443 / Secure Development Lifecycle work
No evidence of MQTT, industrial protocols, or IoT/industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: General senior engineering and architecture experience
